seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Applethorpe and Arafura Sea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Applethorpe vs Arafura Sea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Applethorpe and Arafura Sea.
heading: Applethorpe vs Arafura Sea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Applethorpe, Queensland and Arafura Sea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Applethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Arafura Sea (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Applethorpe or Arafura Sea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Applethorpe has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Arafura Sea scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Applethorpe scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Arafura Sea scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Applethorpe or Arafura Sea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Applethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
